report.summary: UX audited 2 new learn guides (DeFi Insurance, DVT) from today's build cycle, confirmed OG images exist for both, and implemented 3 UX refinements on the DVT guide page (Table of Contents, mobile-responsive grids, Next.js Link navigation).

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: DVT Guide: Added Table of Contents nav section for consistent UX with other learn pages (DeFi Insurance page already had one)
DVT Guide: Fixed 2-column grids (SSV vs Obol strengths, DVT-Lite pros/cons) from rigid '1fr 1fr' to responsive 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr))' — prevents layout breakage on mobile
DVT Guide: Converted 4 related article links from raw <a> tags to Next.js <Link> components for client-side navigation and better performance
DeFi Insurance Guide: No issues found — page already uses responsive grids, Next.js Link, Table of Contents, and proper accessibility patterns

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: defi-insurance-protocols-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — already existed from build cycle, verified correct
OG image: distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — already existed from build cycle, verified correct
No new OG images needed — both today's pages were shipped with OG images in the build cycle

sections.title: UX Audit Summary
items: DeFi Insurance page: Well-structured with ToC, responsive grids, Link components, proper FAQ, disclaimer, and related articles. No issues found.
DVT page: Good content structure but had 3 UX gaps (missing ToC, non-responsive grids, raw <a> tags). All 3 fixed.
Both pages: Correct structured data (Article + FAQ JSON-LD), breadcrumbs, BackToTop, and disclaimer sections
